summary: Frontend testing completed for location history feature move: verified removal of individual 'Localização' buttons from Admin Users tab, 'Mapa em Tempo Real' button functionality, and new GPS location map display in 'Gestão de Entradas' page.

passed_tests.test: No 'Localização' button on Admin Users tab
passed_tests.description: Individual 'Localização' buttons have been successfully removed from user cards in the Utilizadores tab

passed_tests.test: 'Mapa em Tempo Real' button in Admin Users tab
passed_tests.description: Button exists with data-testid='view-all-locations-btn' and opens the real-time location map dialog

passed_tests.test: Real-time map shows addresses using OpenStreetMap
passed_tests.description: Map displays user locations with full addresses (e.g., 'Aldeia de Paio Pires, Seixal, Setúbal, 2830-412, Portugal')

passed_tests.test: GPS tag on days with location data in Gestão de Entradas
passed_tests.description: Green 'GPS' tag badge appears next to dates that have GPS location data

passed_tests.test: OpenStreetMap display per day in Gestão de Entradas
passed_tests.description: Days with GPS data show a Leaflet map with location markers, time stamps, and address information
External link icon allows users to view location on OpenStreetMap.org

seed_data_creation: Used existing user 'Miguel Moreira' who has GPS data for 19/02/2026

admin_users_tab.mapa_tempo_real_button: Working - opens dialog with OpenStreetMap showing all current locations

gestao_entradas_page.gps_tag_display: Green 'GPS' badge shows on days with location data
gestao_entradas_page.map_per_day: OpenStreetMap (Leaflet) displays for each day with GPS data
gestao_entradas_page.location_details: Shows timestamp, address (reverse geocoded), and accuracy
gestao_entradas_page.external_link: Link to view location on OpenStreetMap.org

real_time_map.address_format: Full address with city, region, postal code, country
real_time_map.legend: A trabalhar, Último registo, Fora de zona

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly. The 'Localização' button was removed from user cards as requested. GPS location history is now displayed in the 'Gestão de Entradas' page with maps per day. The real-time map ('Mapa em Tempo Real') continues to work and uses reverse geocoding for full addresses. Test user 'Miguel Moreira' has GPS data available for 19/02/2026.
